projects.name: wp-sudo
projects.description: Sudo for WordPress! 🥪 Risky actions — activating plugins, deleting users, changing key settings — are gated by a required reauthentication step, regardless of user role. Time-bounded sessions, 2FA support, rate limiting, and configurable policies for REST, WP-CLI, Cron, WPGraphQL, & XML-RPC. No role escalation, no new permissions — just a gate. ⛩️
